chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-422 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1935/2022 3. For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner has not been paid his full dues. Learned AAG submits that this is because the petitioner has not provided the necessary documents. This position is refuted by learned counsel for the petitioner. Be that as it may, learned counsel for the petitioner shall provide the required documents to the learned AAG during the course of the day, who shall submit the same to the concerned department. The department shall then pass appropriate orders regarding any payment/dues payable to the petitioner within two months of receipt of such documents. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Secretary, Irrigation Department and the Secretary, Finance Department, for information and compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
